one_time_description: Band invested in a 7% ownership of First Nations Fisheries Interest Group LP carried at cost of $18,796,992
economic_notes: Band owns Taqamkuk Development Corporation, Netukulimk Fisheries Ltd., and Harbour Authority. Economic activities include Cannabis, Conne River Building Supplies, Conne River Garage, Conne River Gas Bar, Miawpukek Wholesalers, Micmac Arts and Crafts. Invested 7% ownership in First Nations Fisheries Interest Group LP for $18,796,992.
notes: Consolidates Miawpukek Band, Taqamkuk Development Corporation, Netukulimk Fisheries Ltd., and Harbour Authority. Major new investment of $18,796,992 for 7% ownership in First Nations Fisheries Interest Group LP recorded in current year. Large prior-year ISC receivable adjustments noted (amounts not received from 2017-2020 totaling over $8M). Allowance for doubtful accounts on receivables increased significantly from $542,387 to $1,426,853. Severance payable of $1,339,468 notable. Schedule of remuneration on page 24 not included in provided images.
